sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_1417_PB_ASSY / MSV-100008 supplied by ㈜케이원코퍼레이션 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents supplier approval information, revision history, materials, QC process controls, inspection criteria, and packaging requirements for the PB product.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_1417_PB_ASSY and part/model number is MSV-100008.
Applicable models are G1417CW and G1417CWP.
Supplier approval dates and document date are 2025.03.12.
QC process chart identifies mass production status and control plan category PVS.
Packaging specification applies to PB products delivered to H&abyz.
